holdings.infoBox: FAD is an equity ETF with a total of 678 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 1.16%, Micron Technology at 1.12%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 0.97%, Western Digital at 0.93%, and Dell Technologies at 0.91%.

overview.description: The First Trust Multi Cap Growth AlphaDEX Fund (FAD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Multi Cap Growth index. The fund tracks an index that uses fundamental factors to select and weight growth stocks from the Nasdaq US Select Indices. FAD was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Multi Cap Growth Index
